meta.title: Inhibition of African Swine Fever (ASF) Virus Replication by Phosphonoacetic Acid

abstractHtml: Phosphonoacetic acid (PAA) inhibits the multiplication of African swine fever (ASF) virus in VERO cells. The observed inhibition of the in vivo DNA synthesis could be related to the in vitro inhibition of a virus-induced DNA polymerase activity present in cytoplasmic extracts from infected VERO cells.
